name: Investec Bank Limited
summary: Investec Bank Limited provides a range of financial products and services to personal and business clients in South Africa and Mauritius. The company offers transactional banking, lending, property finance, and savings to high-income and high net worth private clients; corporate and institutional banking services, such as specialized lending and debt origination activities, and treasury and trading solutions; bespoke lending, other transactional, advisory, and investment offerings to mid-market corporate clients; and principal investments, advisory, and debt and equity capital markets services. It also offers home loans, vehicle finance, high net worth private insurance broking solutions, medical practice finance, and life insurance products. Investec Bank Limited was founded in 1974 and is based in Sandton, South Africa. Investec Bank Limited is a subsidiary of Investec Limited.
